changeSet.author: backend-agent
changeSet.comment: Creating watchlist table for event timeline monitoring with JSONB configuration and filters.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS watchlist ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(500) NULL, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, organization_id INTEGER NULL, configuration JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{"groups": [], "channelIds": []}', filters JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{"timeRange": "24h", "onlyCritical": false, "sortBySeverity": true}', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES "user"(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organization(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: backend-agent
changeSet.comment: Creating indexes, unique constraints, and documentation for watchlist table.
